free_text: Experimental study of complete and incomplete fusion
targets (~0.4-1.0 mg/cm2) were prepared by vacuum
The intensity and energy of backscattered ions
were measured using a semiconductor detector.
A detector calibrated with gamma sources, using
50 Hz pulse for dead time and 152Eu for efficiency.
The beam current on the target was measured by a
Faraday cup and was in the range of ~20 to 25 nA.
